purpose: Initial valuation model and success thresholds for Launchpad Lint.

content.body: Count the first launch cycle as successful only if at least one user completes the full two-call activation path, reports reduced launch ambiguity, and needs only light editing afterward.
Do not treat price as the primary problem unless output quality and activation are already strong enough to justify that conclusion.
Route learning back to growth, designer, builder, pricing, or researcher depending on whether the failure is positioning, output quality, price, or mistaken bottleneck selection.

promotion.notes: First valuation frame for Launchpad Lint.
